events.description: Brainstorm I13 overclaimed: 'FMR1, HTT, C9orf72, ATXN1/2/3/7, DMPK all missing' — only C9orf72 was absent. 7/8 already in 78-locus catalog.
events.mitigation: Probe-before-act (catalog JSON check) caught the error before writing a plan for 8 items

what_worked: Inline probe of catalog JSON confirmed I13 overclaim before any wasted planning
bio-verify by /maintain caught stale locus count in script concurrently — coordinated fix
G14 shipped in 3 ticks: gap-analyze → inline plan+execute → verify
